info.title: dotnet nuget-search
info.description:
Search for Nuget packages using the .NET CLI

      Example: dotnet nuget-search Netwonsoft

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

options.name: --skip
options.description: The number of results to skip, for pagination [default: 0]

options.name: --take
options.description: The number of results to return, for pagination [default: 10]

options.name: --package-type
options.description: The package type to use to filter packages [default: all]

options.name: --list
options.description: Print results as full detail list

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Prints all messages to standard output

options.name: --repository
options.description: The repository to use for searching

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: The search terms to used to filter packages
